title: podochilus hystricinus
intro: Podochilus hystricinus is a species of plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the hairy orchid. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Podochilus hystricinus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, with herbal preparations often involving the use of its roots or leaves.
